gunfuego
I live in Europe. The dominating channel companies Germany ProsiebenSat1 and RTL group are broadcasted via satellite Astra 19 deg East which most German house's dishes are pointed to. The satellite company SES Astra don't provide you with receiver box and don't offer plans/subscriptions. We buy receivers in the electronic store or amazon. The popular channels of ProsiebenSat1, RTL Group, Disney Channel, Comedy Central are Free-to-air here in Germany. Pay-TV is optional and you subscribe them from channel companies like SKY.
Look up the following:
ASTRA 19.2E
RTL Group
ProSiebenSat1
The HD-channels of these channels are encrypted. But you can unlock them from buying a smart card or renewing it once a year. The HD host is the company HD+
And once again the satellite company SES Astra does not offer plans or subscribtions. Neither does Eutelsat.
